message:
fix: use super:: prefix to access private cube_index in test

The cube_index_boundaries test was calling the private function
cube_index() directly, but `use super::*` only imports public items.
Fixed by using explicit super::cube_index() calls to properly access
the private function from the parent module.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
